message:
fix(supply_chain): require detached signatures for all manifest-listed artifacts

verify_release() previously treated a missing detached signature as a
pass (sig_ok = true when no signature existed), allowing
checksum-only artifact substitution to slip through as valid. Invert
the logic so missing signatures produce an explicit "detached signature
missing" failure, and invalid signatures produce "detached signature
invalid". Only a present, valid signature against the key ring passes.

Add regression test for missing-signature rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
